sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3593" key="a)kronifh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-νιφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n3593.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snow-capped</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πάγος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Pae.Delph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
